title: You are Kernel (Codex orchestration system). FUGUE (Claude orchestrator) needs a comprehensive status report on peripheral systems and their adapters/connectors. Please investigate and report on: 1. **Happy.app / Happy VM**: Current development state, what endpoints exist, what's mock vs real, auth...
summary_text: **Status Report** **1. Happy.app / Happy VM** - `EXISTS`: `Happy.app` is a real `happy-web` PWA seed with configured remote contracts for `/api/happy/state`, `/api/happy/events`, `/api/happy/intake`, `/api/happy/recovery`, `/api/happy/task-detail`, plus Cockpit auth endpoints. See [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html):10 and [happy-runtime-config.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js):13. - `EXISTS`: Local-first behavior is implemented now: offline intake queue in localStorage, event-log store in localStorage, projected state model, shared auth-token persistence, and return-to auth resume state. See [happy-app-intake.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js):3, [happy-event-store.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-store.js):10, [happy-state-projector.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-state-projector.js):116, [happy-auth-session.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-session.js):1, [happy-auth-reentry.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js):8. - `EXISTS`: A real backend exists only for `POST /api/happy/intake` and `GET /healthz`; it validates bearer auth and materializes secretary captures. See [happy-secretary-intake-server.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/happy-secretary-intake-server.mjs):69 and [test-happy-secretary-intake-server.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-happy-secretary-intake-server.sh):21. - `PLANNED`: The repo’s own status note still says `happy-web` is an implementation seed, not production, and calls out replacing mock intake/state/recovery/Crow wiring with real backends. See [happy-web-remaining-tasks.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/memories/happy-web-remaining-tasks.md):3. - `PLANNED`: Real server implementations for `/api/happy/state`, `/api/happy/events`, `/api/happy/recovery`, and `/api/happy/task-detail` are described in docs/contracts, but I did not find concrete handlers. See [kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md):401. - `MISSING`: A separate runnable “Happy VM” service/app was not found. What exists under that name is ops/setup material for a backup environment, not a product runtime. See [setup-happy-vm-git.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/commands/setup-happy-vm-git.md):1 and [setup-github-auth.sh](/Users/masayuki/.claude/scripts/setup-github-auth.sh):26. - `AUTH STATUS`: Client auth is real but hybrid. Happy is wired to Cockpit login/refresh endpoints, persists/refreshes tokens, and has Access/password gateway logic; however current `index.html` leaves Access/password URLs empty and points re-entry to `./auth/`. See [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html):24, [happy-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js):23, [happy-auth-session.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-session.js):10. **2. Crow** - `EXISTS`: `Crow` today is a thin local summarizer that turns projected task/event state into short UI copy and formats accepted intake packets. See [happy-app-crow.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-crow.js):13. - `PLANNED`: Docs position Crow as the intake + summarization presence layer above Happy, with richer workflow/status-derived summaries. See [kernel-happy-app-single-front-architecture.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-single-front-architecture.md):193 and [happy-web-remaining-tasks.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/memories/happy-web-remaining-tasks.md):11. - `MISSING`: I did not find a remote Crow service, Crow endpoint implementat...
